name: INVL Baltic Fund
summary: INVL Baltic Fund focuses on investments within the Baltic region (Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia). It is managed by INVL, an asset management company in the Baltics, and aims to provide capital appreciation through investments in various Baltic-based companies or assets. The fund's specific investment strategy and holdings would need to be further researched to determine more precise details.

name: INVL Umbrella Fund - INVL Emerging Europe Bond Subfund
summary: INVL Umbrella Fund - INVL Emerging Europe Bond Subfund invests primarily in debt securities issued by entities in emerging European countries. The subfund is part of the INVL Umbrella Fund, an umbrella fund structure, and aims to generate income and capital appreciation through its investments in the emerging European bond market. INVL is an asset management company based in the Baltics.
